nasb.text: and they blindfolded Him and were asking Him, saying, “Prophesy, who is the one who hit You?”

esv.text: They also blindfolded him and kept asking him, “Prophesy! Who is it that struck you?”

cnv.text: 蒙住他的眼睛問他：“你說預言吧，說打你的是誰。”

ccb.text: 蒙住祂的眼睛，对祂说：“说预言吧！是谁在打你？”

csbs.text: 又蒙住他的眼睛问他，说：“你说预言吧！打你的是谁？”
